caption: A man is seated in a studio, speaking into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a bow tie, glasses, and over-ear headphones. His most striking feature is a tall, blonde, textured wig. In the background, a wall features a framed picture and a logo that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS." Red and white text overlays appear on the screen, including "PODCAST" and "REAL TALK 101." The scene remains static across the frames, with the man maintaining a consistent profile view as he speaks, showing only slight variations in his facial expression and mouth movements. The lighting is bright and even, illuminating the studio environment and the man's eccentric attire.
